title: Getting Started with Astro
summary: A comprehensive guide to building static sites with Astro framework
content:
Astro is a modern static site builder that allows you to use your favorite JavaScript framework components while shipping minimal JavaScript to the browser. This makes it perfect for content-focused websites.

In this guide, we'll explore how to set up an Astro project, create components, and deploy your site to production.

title: The Future of AI in Web Development
summary: Exploring how AI tools are transforming the way we build websites and applications
content:
Artificial intelligence is rapidly changing the landscape of web development. From code generation to design assistance, AI tools are becoming an essential part of the modern developer's toolkit.

In this article, we'll look at current AI tools for web development and predict how they might evolve in the coming years.

title: Optimizing Performance in React Applications
summary: Techniques and best practices for improving the performance of React apps
content: Performance optimization is crucial for providing a good user experience in React applications. This article covers various techniques such as memoization, code splitting, and lazy loading to improve your app's performance.

title: Building a Personal Knowledge Management System
summary: How to create an effective system for organizing and retrieving your knowledge
content: In the age of information overload, having a personal knowledge management system is essential. This article explores different approaches and tools for building a system that works for you.

title: Tailwind CSS vs. Traditional CSS Frameworks
summary: Comparing utility-first CSS approaches with traditional component-based frameworks
content: Tailwind CSS has gained significant popularity in recent years with its utility-first approach. This article compares it with traditional CSS frameworks like Bootstrap and analyzes the pros and cons of each approach.
